project.name: example-saas-app
project.description: Full-stack SaaS application with billing, auth, and dashboard
project.goal: Ship MVP with Stripe billing, NextAuth, and admin dashboard by end of Q2

rules: All code must be TypeScript (strict mode). Use Next.js App Router. Tailwind + shadcn/ui for styling. All API routes must have Zod validation.
context: This is a B2B SaaS targeting small consultancies. Tech stack: Next.js 15, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Stripe, NextAuth. Monorepo structure with turborepo.
